narrative:
Wapakoneta City has 6,417 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
